## CommandDescriptor.name property

Canonical camelCase identifier, matching the SDK function name. Display names for CLI / MCP are derived from this via `toKebabCase` / `toSnakeCase`<!-- -->. Override per-surface only when the natural derivation is misleading (e.g. a deliberately shorter CLI alias).

**Signature:**

```typescript
name: string;
```
